turns.content: Opening the reference data: URL so the test can assert on the CDP target.

arguments.command:
playwright-cli tab-new 'data:text/html,FAKE LLM REFERENCE TARGET

Page A

'

turns.content: Opening comparison pages B and C in parallel so the test can assert on multiple CDP targets.

arguments.command:
playwright-cli tab-new 'data:text/html,FAKE LLM COMPARE ALPHA

Page B

'

playwright-cli tab-new 'data:text/html,FAKE LLM COMPARE BETA

Page C

'

turns.content: Done. Pages B and C are open.
Summary: opened three CDP targets - Page A (FAKE LLM REFERENCE TARGET), Page B (FAKE LLM COMPARE ALPHA), and Page C (FAKE LLM COMPARE BETA).
